name.zh: FATF 高风险与受监控司法辖区

description.en: Public statement listing jurisdictions subject to a call for action (blacklist) and jurisdictions under increased monitoring (greylist).
description.zh: 公开声明所列的行动呼吁国（黑名单）和受加强监控的国家（灰名单）。

name.zh: OFAC 特别指定国民名单

authority: U.S. Department of the Treasury – OFAC

description.en: Primary U.S. consolidated list of individuals and entities subject to asset blocking under OFAC programs.
description.zh: 美国 OFAC 项目下受资产冻结的个人和实体的主要综合名单。

name.zh: OFAC 按国家划分的制裁项目

authority: U.S. Department of the Treasury – OFAC

description.en: Country-level program descriptions including comprehensive embargoes (Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria) and sectoral programs (Russia, Venezuela).
description.zh: 按国家划分的制裁项目说明，包括全面禁运（古巴、伊朗、朝鲜、叙利亚）和部门制裁（俄罗斯、委内瑞拉）。

name.en: UN Security Council Consolidated Sanctions List
name.zh: 联合国安理会综合制裁名单

description.en: Consolidated list of individuals and entities subject to UN Security Council sanctions regimes.
description.zh: 受联合国安理会各制裁机制约束的个人与实体综合清单。

name.zh: 欧盟综合金融制裁名单

description.en: Consolidated list of persons, groups and entities subject to EU financial sanctions.
description.zh: 受欧盟金融制裁的个人、团体和实体综合清单。

description.en: Annual country ranking of money laundering and terrorist financing risks based on 17 indicators (0–10 scale).
description.zh: 基于 17 个指标对各国洗钱与恐怖融资风险进行的年度排名（0-10 分）。

description.en: Annual country ranking on perceived levels of public-sector corruption (0 = highly corrupt, 100 = very clean).
description.zh: 对各国公共部门腐败感知程度的年度排名（0 = 极度腐败，100 = 非常清廉）。

name.zh: 世界银行全球治理指标

description.en: Six governance dimensions including Control of Corruption, scored from -2.5 (weak) to 2.5 (strong).
description.zh: 六大治理维度（包括腐败控制），评分范围 -2.5（弱）至 2.5（强）。

description.en: Country scores on rule of law across constraints on government, corruption, fundamental rights, order, and regulatory enforcement.
description.zh: 对各国在政府约束、腐败、基本权利、秩序与监管执行等方面的法治评分。

description.en: Ranks jurisdictions by their contribution to global financial secrecy and opacity of corporate/beneficial ownership.
description.zh: 按各司法辖区对全球金融保密及公司/受益所有权不透明的贡献进行排名。

description.en: Aggregated open database of sanctions, PEPs, and other watchlists for entity screening.
description.zh: 用于实体筛查的制裁、PEP 及其他关注名单的聚合开放数据库。

name.zh: Control Risks 国家风险预测

description.en: Commercial geopolitical and operational risk ratings used as context for circumvention and jurisdiction monitoring.
description.zh: 用于规避风险与司法辖区监控的商业地缘政治与运营风险评级。
